description.ko: 기하학적 수정을 통과하는 빛이 선명한 무지개색으로 부서지는 매혹적인 탐구입니다. 굴절의 복잡한 패턴과 투명함과 화려함의 상호작용에 초점을 맞춥니다.
description.en: A mesmerizing exploration of light passing through a geometric crystal, breaking into a vibrant rainbow of colors. The focus is on the intricate patterns of refraction and the interplay of transparency and brilliance.

prompt: Cinematic macro shot of a geometric crystalline prism, a single beam of pure white light hitting the edge, hyper-realistic refraction, dispersion of light into a vibrant spectral rainbow, caustic light patterns on a soft minimalist surface, 8k resolution, ethereal atmosphere, chromatic aberration, sharp focus on the internal facets, PRISM-2 aesthetic.
